title: Tesla ‘secret team' would suppress driving-range complaints: report
text: Tesla Inc. TSLA, -0.20% created a “secret team” to stifle complaints about driving range and cancel service appointments by Tesla owners who sought to check on discrepancies between advertised range and real-world driving, Reuters reported Thursday. Going back a decade ago, the electric-vehicle maker “rigged the dashboard readouts in its electric cars to provide ‘rosy' projections of how far owners can drive before needing to recharge,” and last summer created a “diversion” team in Las Vegas to cancel “as many range-related appointments as possible,” the report said.
